message:
feat(frankenterm/main): tick 239 migrate 5 storage CRUD sites (accounts + saved-search + pane-bookmark) (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Continues ticks 237-238's storage-write surface migration. 5 sites
across 3 CLI CRUD command clusters:

1. L21944 usage-metrics `ft status` account upsert:
   `storage.upsert_account_with_cx(&storage_cx, record.clone())`
2. L22840 saved-search create:
   `storage.insert_saved_search_with_cx(&storage_cx, record.clone())`
3. L23439 saved-search delete:
   `storage.delete_saved_search_with_cx(&storage_cx, &name)`
4. L24151 pane-bookmark add:
   `storage.insert_pane_bookmark_with_cx(&storage_cx, record)`
5. L24231 pane-bookmark remove:
   `storage.delete_pane_bookmark_with_cx(&storage_cx, &alias)`

Standard `Cx::current().unwrap_or_else(for_request)` pattern with
locally-scoped `storage_cx` binding.

Verification: `cargo check -p frankenterm --bin ft` compiles clean
via fork bypass (CC=llvm clang, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ft-rusticmaple-target).

Progress: 12/~15 storage-write sites in main.rs migrated. Remaining
~7 sites — all `record_audit_action_redacted` calls across human
send/commit and workflow-related audit paths:
- L24546 human send audit
- L25784, L25857, L25931, L25979 human workflow audits
- L26714, L26927 prepare audit
- L27262, L27341, L27602 commit audits

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
